sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Subordinate Courts Shorttitle
sections.text:
This Act may be cited as the Subordinate Courts Shorttitle
(Amendment) Act, 2018 and shall be read as one with the
SubordinateCourtsAct,inthisActreferredtoastheprincipalAct. Cap. 28
